_doc: Cost-normalized comparison inputs for the d20 3-way (MLP V2 / Run C / Run A). Wallclock and tok/sec extracted from dispatcher_runs/*.log; FLOPs from RESULTS_2026-05-04 §1; bpb / CORE final from RESULTS §2-§4.

MLP V2.label: mlp_d20_reference_v2_seed0
MLP V2.preempt_note: Final-step crash on psutil; trajectory completed cleanly; total time ≈ 141.10m from log.

Run A.label: full_rlkv_b2_all_grid5_lwarmup
Run A.preempt_note: Modal worker preempted at step ~13250; resumed from ckpt 12000. Wallclock 260.45m is cumulative across both segments (resume log persists the timer).

wallclock_equivalents._doc: What does each method look like at MLP V2's wallclock budget (141.10m)? Used for the same-wallclock fair-cost row. Step at MLP-equivalent = (141.10 / wallclock_minutes) × num_iterations, rounded down. bpb / CORE values at that step are interpolated from the trajectory data in benchmarks/data/trajectory_2026-05-04.json (linear between bracketing eval points).
